---
title: "test_quota_hard_stop.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\augmented_intel\test_quota_hard_stop.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.70
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.08
---

## Intent
The `test_quota_hard_stop.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestQuotaHardStop, setup_quota, test_quota_increment, MockResponse, raise_for_status, json, test_quota_hard_stop, test_monthly_reset. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestQuotaHardStop, setup_quota, test_quota_increment, MockResponse, raise_for_status, json, test_quota_hard_stop, test_monthly_reset. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)

### Exports
- `TestQuotaHardStop`
- `setup_quota`
- `test_quota_increment`
- `MockResponse`
- `raise_for_status`
- `json`
- `test_quota_hard_stop`
- `test_monthly_reset`
